define.name: PWM_OUTPUT_ACTIVE_HIGH
define.brief: Positive PWM logic, active level is logic one.

define.name: PWM_OUTPUT_ACTIVE_LOW
define.brief: Inverse PWM logic, active level is logic zero.

define.name: PWM_EVENT_ALL_CHANNELS
define.brief: All PWM channel event flags supported by notifications.

config.name: PWM_USE_CONFIGURATIONS
config.note: When enabled the user must provide a variable named @p pwm_configurations of type @p pwm_configurations_t.

macro.name: PWM_EVENT_CHANNEL
macro.brief: Returns the event flag associated to a PWM channel.
macro.return: The event flag associated to the specified channel.

macro.name: PWM_FRACTION_TO_WIDTH
macro.brief: Converts from fraction to pulse width.
macro.param: Pointer to the PWM driver instance.
macro.return: The pulse width to be passed to @p pwmEnableChannel().

macro.name: PWM_DEGREES_TO_WIDTH
macro.brief: Converts from degrees to pulse width.
macro.param: Pointer to the PWM driver instance.
Degrees as an integer between 0 and 36000.
macro.return: The pulse width to be passed to @p pwmEnableChannel().

macro.name: PWM_PERCENTAGE_TO_WIDTH
macro.brief: Converts from percentage to pulse width.
macro.param: Pointer to the PWM driver instance.
Percentage as an integer between 0 and 10000.
macro.return: The pulse width to be passed to @p pwmEnableChannel().

macro.name: _pwm_isr_invoke_cb
macro.param: Pointer to the PWM driver instance.

typedef.name: pwmchnmsk_t
typedef.brief: Type of a PWM channels mask.

typedef.name: hal_pwm_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a PWM driver.

typedef.name: hal_pwm_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a PWM configuration.

typedef.name: hal_pwm_channel_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a PWM channel configuration.

typedef.name: PWMDriver
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a PWM driver (legacy).

typedef.name: PWMConfig
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a PWM configuration (legacy).

typedef.name: PWMChannelConfig
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a PWM channel configuration (legacy).

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ pwm_lld_config_fields;

field.name: cfgsnum
field.brief: Number of configurations in the open array.

field.name: enabled_events
field.brief: Mask of the enabled PWM events.

field.name: channels
field.brief: Number of channels in this instance.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ pwm_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: pwmChangePeriodI
method.brief: Changes the period of the PWM peripheral.

method.name: pwmChangePeriod
method.brief: Changes the period of the PWM peripheral.

method.name: pwmEnableChannelI
method.brief: Enables a PWM channel.
method.param: PWM pulse width in timer ticks.

method.name: pwmEnableChannel
method.brief: Enables a PWM channel.
method.param: PWM pulse width in timer ticks.

method.name: pwmDisableChannelI
method.brief: Disables a PWM channel.

method.name: pwmDisableChannel
method.brief: Disables a PWM channel.

method.name: pwmEnableEventsI
method.brief: Enables PWM event notifications.

method.name: pwmEnableEvents
method.brief: Enables PWM event notifications.

method.name: pwmDisableEventsI
method.brief: Disables PWM event notifications.

method.name: pwmDisableEvents
method.brief: Disables PWM event notifications.

method.name: pwmEnablePeriodicNotification
method.brief: Enables the periodic activation edge notification.
method.implementation: pwmEnableEvents(self, PWM_EVENT_PERIOD);

method.name: pwmDisablePeriodicNotification
method.brief: Disables the periodic activation edge notification.
method.implementation: pwmDisableEvents(self, PWM_EVENT_PERIOD);

method.name: pwmEnableChannelNotification
method.brief: Enables a channel de-activation edge notification.

method.name: pwmDisableChannelNotification
method.brief: Disables a channel de-activation edge notification.

method.name: pwmIsChannelEnabledI
method.brief: Returns a PWM channel status.
method.implementation: return (bool)((self->enabled & ((pwmchnmsk_t)1U << (pwmchnmsk_t)channel)) != 0U);

method.name: pwmEnablePeriodicNotificationI
method.brief: Enables the periodic activation edge notification.
method.implementation: pwmEnableEventsI(self, PWM_EVENT_PERIOD);

method.name: pwmDisablePeriodicNotificationI
method.brief: Disables the periodic activation edge notification.
method.implementation: pwmDisableEventsI(self, PWM_EVENT_PERIOD);

method.name: pwmEnableChannelNotificationI
method.brief: Enables a channel de-activation edge notification.

method.name: pwmDisableChannelNotificationI
method.brief: Disables a channel de-activation edge notification.
method.implementation: osalDbgCheck(channel < self->channels); pwmDisableEventsI(self, PWM_EVENT_CHANNEL(channel));

method.name: pwmGetEventsX
method.brief: Returns the cached PWM event flags.
method.implementation: return self->events;

method.name: pwmGetAndClearEventsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached PWM event flags.
method.param: Mask of events to be returned and cleared.

method.implementation: return (const void *)pwm_lld_setcfg(self, (const hal_pwm_config_t *)config);
return (const void *)pwm_lld_selcfg(self, cfgnum);
pwm_lld_set_callback(self, cb);
